intro.heading: ANWESHA
intro.description: Welcome to Anwesha's corner of the internet! She's a developer, dreamer, and full-time birthday queen. When she's not coding, she's probably planning her next adventure or eating cake. More about her as you scroll down!

fancySection.subtitle: Collabs & Meets!
fancySection.content: Anwesha's Heart.exe is Running... She fell in love with code, then fell in love with someone who codes. Together, they built projects, broke things, fixed things, and laughed through it all.
fancySection.contactNote: Want to wish her happy birthday or collaborate? Reach out!
fancySection.shoutoutText: for being the most amazing people in her journey! Happy Birthday Anwesha!
